sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n98639" key="sumperii/ptamai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συμπερι-ίπταμαι</orth>, <sense id="n98639.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fly about with</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ταῖς ἀκρίσιν</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2687.tlg001:1:57" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Zos.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.57</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
